realm.name: scheduler
realm.description: Represents an FM Flow employee that helps new customers get assigned to an Account Manager.

realm.name: pro
realm.description: Represents a non-FM Flow Employee that uses our software to run their business.

realm.name: chatbot
realm.description: Used by the AI Chatbot that can help customers schedule an estimate over the phone.

realm.name: superadmin
realm.description: Represents an FM Flow employee that can manage employees in our system.

realm.name: tempcustomer
realm.description: Represents a customer that is in the process of setting up their account.

realm.name: temppro
realm.description: Represents a Pro that is in the middle of setting up their account.

realm.name: accountmanager
realm.description: Represents an FM Flow Employee that helps Pros use our software.

realm.name: customer
realm.description: Represents a customer of a Pro.

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

clientScopes.name: organization
clientScopes.description: Additional claims about the organization a subject belongs to

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token

clientScopes.name: basic
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add all basic claims to the token

clientScopes.name: service_account
clientScopes.description: Specific scope for a client enabled for service accounts
